hook: Most women don't realize the biggest bone loss happens before menopause.

script.hook: One surprising truth about bone health during menopause.
beats: Women can lose up to 20% of bone density in the 5-7 years before menopause.
This rapid decline is due to fluctuating estrogen levels that increase bone resorption.
Starting preventive measures early can make a significant difference.
script.close: Follow BestKarma for science-backed health without the hype.

visualPlan: Visual of a woman looking concerned while reading about menopause.
